description: Approve a pending permission request for an agent
name: approve

id.description: Agent ID — accepts stable ID (e.g., "a1b2c3d4"), pane target (e.g., "main:0.0"), PTY session UUID, or "pr:N"

description: Delete a git worktree
name: delete_worktree

force.description: Force delete even if worktree has uncommitted changes

repo.description: Repository path (optional, defaults to cwd or first registered project)

description: Get detailed info about a specific agent
name: get_agent

id.description: Agent ID — accepts stable ID (e.g., "a1b2c3d4"), pane target (e.g., "main:0.0"), PTY session UUID, or "pr:N"

description: Get the terminal output of an agent
name: get_agent_output

id.description: Agent ID — accepts stable ID (e.g., "a1b2c3d4"), pane target (e.g., "main:0.0"), PTY session UUID, or "pr:N"

description: Get the unit's aim-tree navigation (per repo: tree / DAG edges / drift / working_delta + per-node progress flag: some-todo|all-done|no-process|unknown). Body-less, read-only — pull current aim state before touching an aim or when code lands.
name: get_aims

unit.description: Unit name — a live Producer's unit (`unit ≡ live Producer`; e.g. `tmai`).

description: Get CI failure log for a branch
name: get_ci_failure_log

repo.description: Repository path (optional, defaults to first registered project)

description: Get CI check results for a branch
name: get_ci_status

name: get_issue_body

name: get_issue_comments

name: get_issue_labels

repo.description: Repository path (optional, defaults to first registered project)

description: Get PR description body
name: get_pr_body

repo.description: Repository path (optional, defaults to first registered project)

description: Get PR comments and reviews
name: get_pr_comments

repo.description: Repository path (optional, defaults to first registered project)

description: Get PR unified diff
name: get_pr_diff

repo.description: Repository path (optional, defaults to first registered project)

description: Get PR labels
name: get_pr_labels

repo.description: Repository path (optional, defaults to first registered project)

description: Get PR merge status
name: get_pr_merge_status

repo.description: Repository path (optional, defaults to first registered project)

description: Get the unit's current-state bundle in one call: aim-tree nav + live agents + open PRs + open issues + open-todo backlog count. Unit-scoped, read-only — pull at boot or any 'where do things stand' moment.
name: get_status

unit.description: Unit name — a live Producer's unit (`unit ≡ live Producer`; e.g. `tmai`).

description: Get the conversation transcript of an agent
name: get_transcript

id.description: Agent ID — accepts stable ID (e.g., "a1b2c3d4"), pane target (e.g., "main:0.0"), PTY session UUID, or "pr:N"

description: Get a file's content from a unit repo (repo must be in the unit; path must resolve within it; 1 MB limit). Read-only.
name: get_unit_file

repo.description:
Repo root — must be one of the unit's `repos[]` (as listed by
`list_unit_files`).

unit.description: Unit name — a live Producer's unit (`unit ≡ live Producer`).

description: Get the raw markdown of a unit hand-over baton (active or a named archive)
name: get_unit_handoff

name.description:
`active` for the live baton, or an archive filename as returned by
`list_unit_handoffs`.

unit.description: Unit name — a live Producer's unit (`unit ≡ live Producer`).

description: Get diff stats for a branch
name: git_diff_stat

repo.description: Repository path (optional, defaults to first registered project)

description: Kill (terminate) an agent by ID
name: kill_agent

id.description: Agent ID — accepts stable ID (e.g., "a1b2c3d4"), pane target (e.g., "main:0.0"), PTY session UUID, or "pr:N"

description: List monitored AI agents (scoped to current project by default). Filter by phase: working, blocked, idle, offline.
name: list_agents

phase.description: Filter by phase: "working", "blocked", "idle", "offline" (optional, returns all if omitted)

project.description:
Filter by project path (git_common_dir). Defaults to the MCP client's own project context.
Set to "*" to list agents from all projects.

description: List git branches
name: list_branches

repo.description: Repository path (optional, defaults to first registered project)

description: List open issues
name: list_issues

repo.description: Repository path (optional, defaults to first registered project)

description: List open pull requests
name: list_prs

repo.description: Repository path (optional, defaults to first registered project)

description: List files in a unit's repos (one tree per unit repo). Read-only.
name: list_unit_files

unit.description: Unit name — a live Producer's unit (`unit ≡ live Producer`; e.g. `tmai`).

description: List a unit's hand-over batons (active + archived) with parsed composed_at/task. Read-only.
name: list_unit_handoffs

unit.description: Unit name — a live Producer's unit (`unit ≡ live Producer`; e.g. `tmai`).

description: List all git worktrees
name: list_worktrees

description: Merge a pull request (checks CI first, then squash/merge/rebase with optional branch and worktree cleanup)
name: merge_pr

delete_branch.description: Delete remote branch after merge (default: true)

delete_worktree.description: Clean up associated worktree after merge (default: false)

repo.description: Repository path (optional, defaults to first registered project)

worktree_name.description: Worktree name to clean up (auto-detected from branch if omitted)

description: Rerun failed CI checks
name: rerun_ci

repo.description: Repository path (optional, defaults to first registered project)

description: Review a pull request — approve, request changes, or post a comment
name: review_pr

repo.description: Repository path (optional, defaults to first registered project)

description: Send a special key to an agent
name: send_key

id.description: Agent ID — accepts stable ID, pane target, PTY session UUID, or "pr:N"

key.description: Key name (Enter, Escape, Space, Up, Down, Left, Right, Tab, BTab, BSpace)

description: Send and submit a prompt to an agent (queues if busy, delivers when idle; Enter is appended)
name: send_prompt

id.description: Agent ID — accepts stable ID, pane target, PTY session UUID, or "pr:N"

prompt.description: Prompt text to send to the agent

description: Send text input to an agent
name: send_text

id.description: Agent ID — accepts stable ID, pane target, PTY session UUID, or "pr:N"

text.description: Text to send to the agent

description: Spawn a new AI agent in a directory
name: spawn_agent

effort.description:
Per-dispatch effort override (`low`/`medium`/`high`/`xhigh`/`max`).
When omitted, falls through to `[spawn.claude].implementer_effort` /
`default_effort` or the CLI's built-in default.

model.description:
Per-dispatch model override (e.g. `claude-sonnet-4-6`). When omitted,
resolution falls through to `[spawn.<type>].default_model` and then to
the CLI's user-global default.

prompt.description: Initial prompt to send after the agent starts (optional)

description: Create a worktree and spawn an agent in it
name: spawn_worktree

base_branch.description: Base branch to fork from (defaults to main)

name.description:
Worktree name (e.g. "174-feat-foo"). The Producer chooses it — tmai no
longer derives names or prompts from GitHub issues (the issue-dispatch
resolution path is retired; the Producer reads the issue and writes the
spec into `prompt`).

prompt.description: Initial prompt to send after the agent starts (optional)

repo.description: Repository path (optional, defaults to cwd or first registered project)

description: Write the Producer hand-off baton (active.md) for the unit owning the resolved repo (handoff-lifecycle DR §C step 3)
name: tmai_handoff_write

content.description:
Hand-off markdown body for the Producer's `▶ Where you left off`
section. Frontmatter (`---\nunit: ...\ntask: ...\n---\n`) is
optional but recommended — see the hand-off-lifecycle DR §6.
`Handoff::parse` must accept it; an empty body (after trim) is
rejected with `malformed_handoff`.

repo.description:
Optional repo path; matches the `spawn_worktree` `repo` param
shape. When omitted, falls back to the MCP client's current
working directory. The server resolves the owning unit from this
path via `Settings::unit_for_path`.
